changeSet.author: backend-agent
changeSet.comment: Creating watchlist table for event timeline monitoring.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS watchlist ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(500) NULL, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, organization_id INTEGER NULL, default_time_range VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '24h', default_only_critical BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, default_sort_by_severity BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES "user"(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organization(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: backend-agent
changeSet.comment: Creating watchlist_channel junction table for many-to-many relationship.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS watchlist_channel ( watchlist_id INTEGER NOT NULL, channel_id INTEGER NOT NULL, position INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (watchlist_id, channel_id), FOREIGN KEY (watchlist_id) REFERENCES watchlist(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (channel_id) REFERENCES channel(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: backend-agent
changeSet.comment: Creating indexes, unique constraints, and documentation for watchlist tables.
